descriptionShort: CAHA warns Alberta-B.C. junior championship between Red Deer Rustlers and Richmond Sockeyes could be cancelled or moved due to fan misconduct.
descriptionLong: The Canadian Amateur Hockey Association announced that unruly fan behavior at Red Deer Arena has jeopardized the junior hockey championship series between the Red Deer Rustlers and Richmond Sockeyes. Game 4, won 7-1 by Red Deer, was delayed 30 minutes by on-ice fights and a bench-clearing incident where disorderly fans threw eggs and debris at Richmond players. The CAHA threatened cancellation or relocation unless fan conduct improves.

attribution.headline: Alberta-B.C. junior hockey championship at risk due to fan unruly behavior
